name: LD2410 Sensor
description: The `ld2410` selects allow you to configure your sensor hardware.

config_entries.label: Ld2410 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for the [Ld2410](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ld2410/) component if you are using multiple components.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the Ld2410 component to set.

config_entries.label: Baud Rate
config_entries.description: Control the serial port baud rate. Defaults to `256000`. Once changed, all sensors will stop working until you reinstall your configuration with an updated [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) configuration. All options from [Select](https://esphome.io/components/select#config-select).

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: The name for the select. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Icon
config_entries.description: Manually set the icon to use for the select in the frontend.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for code generation. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Disabled By Default
config_entries.description: If true, then this entity should not be added to any client's frontend, (usually Home Assistant) without the user manually enabling it (via the Home Assistant UI). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Entity Category
config_entries.description: The category of the entity. See [https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties) for a list of available options. Set to `""` to remove the default entity category.

config_entries.label: Internal
config_entries.description: Mark this component as internal. Internal components will not be exposed to the frontend (like Home Assistant). Only specifying an `id` without a `name` will implicitly set this to true.

config_entries.label: Distance Resolution
config_entries.description: Control the gates distance resolution. Can be `0.75m` or `0.2m`. Defaults to `0.75m`. All options from [Select](https://esphome.io/components/select#config-select).

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: The name for the select. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Icon
config_entries.description: Manually set the icon to use for the select in the frontend.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for code generation. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Disabled By Default
config_entries.description: If true, then this entity should not be added to any client's frontend, (usually Home Assistant) without the user manually enabling it (via the Home Assistant UI). Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Entity Category
config_entries.description: The category of the entity. See [https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties](https://developers.home-assistant.io/docs/core/entity/#generic-properties) for a list of available options. Set to `""` to remove the default entity category.

config_entries.label: Internal
config_entries.description: Mark this component as internal. Internal components will not be exposed to the frontend (like Home Assistant). Only specifying an `id` without a `name` will implicitly set this to true.

config_entries.label: Light Function
config_entries.description: If set, will affect the OUT pin value, based on [light threshold](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ld2410#ld2410-light-threshold). Can be `off`, `low` or `above`. Defaults to `off`. All options from [Select](https://esphome.io/components/select#config-select).

config_entries.description: The name for the select. At least one of **id** and **name** must be specified.

config_entries.label: Icon
config_entries.description: Manually set the icon to use for the select in the frontend.

config_entries.label: Out Pin Level
config_entries.description: Control OUT pin `away` value. Can be `low` or `high`. Defaults to `low`. All options from [Select](https://esphome.io/components/select#config-select).
